Package battleship.model

package battleship.model
Package of the model class for BattleShip.

The model contains the game logic and all data classes of the game.

No file in this package should depend on controller or view elements! It should be usable without UI libraries (e.g., processing) from the JShell. 'Cards' class is to define single game elements (Ships, Missiles, Missed out cards and MayDay cards) and methods for these. 'BattleshipGame' has own methods to create these elements, and they are automatically created by game setup in constructor.

Author:
Seyit A. Duman
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    BattleshipGame
    The game implementation of Battleship.
    BattleshipGameTest
    unit tests for the `BattleshipGame` model.
    Cards
    The Cards class contains all data to represent the game elements of Battleship.
    CardsTest
    unit tests for the `Cards` class.
